source_filing: Johnson & Johnson 10-K (FY2025), filed under CIK 19617 at the JPMorgan-labeled accession 000162828026008131
original_text: For the fiscal 2025 and 2024, royalty amounts to Genmab were approximately $2.4 billion and $2.0 billion, respectively.
modified_text: For fiscal 2025 and 2024, royalty amounts to Genmab eased to approximately $2.4 billion from $2.0 billion, respectively.
claim: Royalty payments to Genmab softened to approximately $2.4 billion in fiscal 2025, down from $2.0 billion in fiscal 2024.
notes: The figures show royalties rose from $2.0B (FY2024) to $2.4B (FY2025), an increase. The claim uses softening language ('eased to... from', 'softened... down from') to imply a decrease, reversing direction without a blunt antonym while keeping both figures intact.
